title: senecio illinitus
intro: Senecio illinitus, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio illinitus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio illinitus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
